## Meeting Purpose

[To discuss ongoing tasks, address issues, and prioritize work for Sulaman Ahmed.](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sulaman is on track with dashboards and article publishing but faces challenges with incomplete local dashboard requests](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [A new template for local dashboard requests will be created to address information gaps](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Communication improvements: Sulaman should use Slack for feedback requests and post deployed dashboards in group channels for broader review](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Vivek's dashboard template approach is preferred over Dave's due to sustainability and fewer bugs](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Automation of data import from Airtable to BigQuery for Looker dashboards is a future consideration, but not an immediate priority](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Topics

### Dashboard Request Process Improvements

  - [Four recent local dashboard requests lacked complete information (missing columns, data, or GFO tags in Airtable)](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Andy suggested creating a template for dashboard requests to ensure all necessary information is provided](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Sulaman will create this template today to streamline the process](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### Communication and Feedback Enhancements

  - [Sulaman should use Slack channels for direct feedback requests instead of Linear mentions](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Deployed dashboards should be posted in group channels for broader review, allowing multiple team members to provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [This approach prevents iterative changes and ensures comprehensive feedback from the start](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)

### Looker Dashboard Template Updates

  - [Vivek's template approach is preferred over Dave's due to sustainability](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Dave's template had issues, including potential code obsolescence within weeks and swear bugs](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Half of Dave's dashboard is no longer working due to technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Vivek's approach allows for continuous improvement based on feedback from various team members](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Data Automation Considerations

  - [Discussion about automating data import from Airtable to BigQuery for Looker dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [BigQuery integration could streamline the process and eliminate manual copy-pasting](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [This automation is a future consideration, not an immediate priority due to other pressing tasks](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Urgent Tasks and Priorities

  - [Creating instructional videos for MEs on how to add published links to Looker backend (5-minute video explaining formatting for GFC and GA4)](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Completing School AI and Monograph Looker dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Addressing Home Base dashboard issues (GA4 data not appearing, possibly due to high traffic volume)](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Publishing articles for Galileo (high priority for today)](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

### Client-Specific Issues

  - [Discern: Jen's feedback on dashboard metrics and data representation to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [Home Base: Investigating GA4 data visibility issues](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
  - [Metronome: Awaiting information from Joe about published column](https://fathom.video/share/W6EDh16pzmg6zSwVWANR_wx1yc2jh8ho?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
